description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ownCloud CI that runs on every pull request and push to master and 2.7 branches. Use a matrix build job that runs on different operating systems (windows-latest, macos-latest, ubuntu-18.04) with various targets (windows-msvc2017_32-cl, windows-msvc2017_64-cl, macos-64-clang, linux-64-gcc). For each target, check out the source code, clone CraftMaster, craft unshelve, prepare, install dependencies, build, run tests, package, prepare artifacts, and upload artifacts.
